prompt: A single ICON-ONLY brand symbol on a pure solid WHITE background, centered with margin, NO text, NO wordmark, NO letters spelled out — just one clean symbolic logo mark. The mark fuses three elements into one: a capital letter 'A' silhouette whose two diagonal legs are formed by the twin strands of a DNA DOUBLE-HELIX twisting up, and a small '+' (plus / cross) integrated at the apex or as the crossbar of the A. Two-tone palette ONLY: San Marino blue (muted slate-denim blue ~#4D6E9E) and silver-grey, with near-black navy, on white. Minimal, premium, clinical biotech. Crisp clean vector mark, geometric and balanced. NO words.
